field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '分包登记', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'subcontract_register_document_no_display', 'subcontract_register_title_display']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'request_id', 'contract_id', 'subcontract_scope', 'subcontract_register_subcontract_content_display']}, {'title': '分包单位与责任人', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['subcontractor_id', 'responsible_id']}, {'title': '履约期间', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['register_date', 'sign_date', 'start_date', 'end_date']}, {'title': '金额与履约边界', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['registered_amount', 'amount_total', 'quantity_total', 'invoice_amount', 'paid_amount', 'unpaid_amount', 'uninvoiced_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '登记明细', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['line_ids']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['management_note', 'note', 'message_attachment_count']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'subcontract_register_document_no_display', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'subcontract_register_title_display', 'sequence': 40, 'group_title': 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'subcontract_scope', 'sequence': 80, 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'subcontract_register_subcontract_content_display', 'sequence': 90, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'subcontractor_id', 'sequence': 100, 'group_title': '分包单位与责任人'}, {'name': 'responsible_id', 'sequence': 110, 'group_title': '分包单位与责任人'}, {'name': 'register_date', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '履约期间'}, {'name': 'sign_date', 'sequence': 130, 'group_title': '履约期间', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'start_date', 'sequence': 140, 'group_title': '履约期间'}, {'name': 'end_date', 'sequence': 150, 'group_title': '履约期间'}, {'name': 'registered_amount', 'sequence': 160, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'amount_total', 'sequence': 170, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'quantity_total', 'sequence': 180, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'invoice_amount', 'sequence': 190, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'paid_amount', 'sequence': 200, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'unpaid_amount', 'sequence': 210, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'uninvoiced_amount', 'sequence': 220, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 230, 'group_title': '金额与履约边界', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'line_ids', 'sequence': 240, 'group_title': '登记明细'}, {'name': 'management_note', 'sequence': 250, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 260, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'message_attachment_count', 'sequence': 270, 'group_title': '说明与附件', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_fact_model', 'sequence': 280, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': '来源追溯'} ] } } } }

field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '分包结算', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'subcontract_settlement_document_no_display', 'subcontract_settlement_title_display']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'register_id', 'contract_id', 'subcontractor_id']}, {'title': '经办与结算期间', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['owner_id', 'settlement_date', 'subcontract_settlement_settlement_start_date_display', 'subcontract_settlement_settlement_end_date_display']}, {'title': '结算金额', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount_untaxed', 'tax_amount', 'amount_total', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '付款与申请边界', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['subcontract_settlement_payment_status_display', 'payment_paid_amount', 'payment_unpaid_amount', 'subcontract_settlement_payment_request_status_display', 'payment_requested_amount', 'payment_unrequested_amount']}, {'title': '结算明细', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['line_ids']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'message_attachment_count']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'subcontract_settlement_source_created_by_display', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'subcontract_settlement_document_no_display', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'subcontract_settlement_title_display', 'sequence': 40, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'subcontractor_id', 'sequence': 80, 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'owner_id', 'sequence': 90, 'group_title': '经办与结算期间'}, {'name': 'settlement_date', 'sequence': 'subcontract_settlement_settlement_end_date_display', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '经办与结算期间', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'amount_untaxed', 'sequence': 130, 'group_title': '结算金额', 'readonly':
